note: seq=116: FIX website-discovery publish -- the prior run (20k + M1 crawl) exceeded its 20min timeout before publishing website-discovery.json. Reconfigure to the INSTANT KEYLESS methods only (M4 parse source payload URLs + M5 email-domain), NO crawl, 400k batch -> fast, no timeout, publishes the real website% before->after lift. M1 corroborated-permutation crawl + the no-API OSM/Common-Crawl finders are the next (heavier) pass. Background-run now.

steps.note: seq=116: website-discovery keyless (M4+M5) fast lift measurement.

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS Tier-2 website discovery (M4 payload + M5 email, keyless/instant)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=15
IOSchedulingClass=idle
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
Environment=WSD_BATCH=400000
Environment=WSD_CRAWL=0
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_website_discovery.py
TimeoutStartSec=900

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS website-discovery hourly

[Timer]
OnBootSec=3min
OnUnitActiveSec=1h
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import subprocess as s; s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-website-discovery.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-website-discovery.service']); print('wsd keyless (M4+M5) running on 400k website-less records')"
